title: Fix ProjectUpdater accessibility and mobile navigation gaps
description: Follow-up from ProjectUpdater accessibility audit: below 900px the app hides the only persistent navigation, and form/stateful controls lack programmatic labels/ARIA state. Implement a narrow app/index.html fix after TASK-123 without changing app architecture or storage model.
acceptance_criteria: Phone-width and sub-900px layouts expose keyboard-accessible navigation to Dashboard, Projects, Quick Note, and Add Project
Form controls have programmatic labels via label/for or aria-labelledby without relying only on visual .fl text or placeholders
Stateful controls expose state semantics, including filter chips and priority segmented controls, using appropriate ARIA such as aria-pressed or aria-current
Visible focus styling is clear on the dark theme for buttons and form controls
Standalone app behavior and localStorage persistence remain unchanged
